genres.label: Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก
genres.note: Tipiṭaka texts — Sutta, Vinaya, Abhidhamma and commentary.

genres.label: Jātaka · ชาดก
genres.note: Birth-tales of the Buddha (chadok), incl. the Vessantara.

genres.label: Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน
genres.note: Tamnan — temple, relic and dynastic chronicles.

genres.label: Grammar & Lexicography · ไวยากรณ์
Astrology · โหราศาสตร์
genres.note: Horā — horoscopy, planetary reckoning, calendrical prediction.

genres.label: Magic & Ritual · ไสยศาสตร์
genres.note: Saiyasat — yantra, mantra, protective and ritual magic.

genres.label: Customary Law · กฎหมายจารีต
genres.note: Customary law — the Mangrai code and local ordinances.

genres.label: Poetry & Literature · วรรณกรรม
genres.note: Secular poetry and literary works (khlong, khao).

genres.label: Liturgy & Chanting · บทสวด
genres.note: Chanting and liturgy for recitation (suat mon).

genres.label: Divination & Omens · การทำนาย
genres.note: Omen-reading, dream and lot divination (mo duu).

scripts.label: Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา
Tham Lao · อักษรธรรมลาว
Shan · อักษรไทใหญ่
Thai · อักษรไทย
Tham Lue · อักษรธรรมลื้อ
Burmese · อักษรพม่า
Khom · อักษรขอม
Thai Nithet (Fak Kham) · อักษรฝักขาม

temples.value: Wat Phra That Chang Kham Worawihan
temples.label: Wat Phra That Chang Kham Worawihan

waysIn.label: Lersi / Ruesi (ascetic-seers)
waysIn.hook: The ascetic seer-sages who keep the wichaa — teachers of yantra and spell.

waysIn.label: Phrommachat (12-year almanac)
waysIn.hook: The twelve-year almanac: birth-animal, fortune, and the making of a match.

waysIn.label: Katha (Pali spell-formulae)
waysIn.hook: Pali spell-formulae — the words of power, chanted and inscribed.

waysIn.label: Yantra / Yan (nyan)
waysIn.hook: Sacred diagrams (yan) — the drawn magic, inked on cloth, skin, and metal.

waysIn.label: Naga (sacred serpent)
waysIn.hook: The sacred serpent, guardian of water, treasure, and the world below.

waysIn.label: Horā almanac (Holasat)
waysIn.hook: The horā almanac — how a diviner reads time, fate, and the lucky day.

waysIn.label: Suep Cata (life-extension rite)
waysIn.hook: The rite that lengthens a threatened life when the stars turn against it.

waysIn.label: Thon (protective / funerary rite)
waysIn.hook: Protective and funerary chant, spoken over the house and the dead.

waysIn.label: Su Khwan (soul-calling)
waysIn.hook: Soul-calling — binding the wandering khwan back into the body.

waysIn.label: Mahāsamaya Sutta
waysIn.hook: The Great Assembly: the gods gathered to hear the Buddha teach.

waysIn.label: Vessantara / Mahāchat
waysIn.hook: The Great Birth (Mahāchat) — the most-told, most-merit jataka of all.

waysIn.label: Mangraisat (Mangrai code)
waysIn.hook: The Mangrai code, the old law of the Lanna kingdom.

waysIn.label: Lokanīti
waysIn.hook: Worldly wisdom — maxims for conduct, rule, and getting on in life.

waysIn.label: Thammasat (dhammasattha)
waysIn.hook: The dhammasattha, root treatise beneath traditional law.
